name: make-first
description: Make-centric development plugin: enforces Makefile structure, TDD practices, shell scripting standards, and the uv/Python toolchain. Auto-redirects direct tool invocations to make targets.

_meta.notes: manifest moved to .claude-plugin/plugin.json — DRY path discovered by both Copilot CLI and Claude Code; pre-tool hook uses modifiedArgs to auto-redirect direct tool calls to make targets with additionalContext for agent learning; CLI 1.0.26 provides COPILOT_PLUGIN_ROOT env var to hooks — used for robust path resolution
